body.title: Skills path portability, sync mechanism, and reference chat agent
body.text:
# D-skills-portability-2026-05-05
**title:** Skills path portability, sync mechanism, and reference chat agent
**date:** 2026-05-05
**status:** open
**spawned_tickets:** T-cc-workflow-tools-env-var, T-skills-sync-skill, T-agentctl-env-and-skills, T-reference-chat-agent

## Decision narrative
Replace hardcoded `~/TheIgors/lab/claudecode/` paths in all 29 skill files with installer-set env vars (`UNSEEN_UNIVERSITY_HOME`, `CC_WORKFLOW_TOOLS`). Build a skills-sync skill that bidirectionally synchronizes `~/.claude/skills/` with the repo canonical copy using batch consent — this is also the foundation for swarm engram exchange across Igor boxes. Wire both into `agentctl init` as the zero-friction install entry point. Add a reference chat agent to UnseenUniversity as the "OpenClaw without crappy patterns" starting point for building agents on the rack.

## Rollup

**Closed at:** 2026-05-06T01:00:26.310136+00:00
**Ticket count:** 4 (all closed)

### Shipped via
- T-cc-workflow-tools-env-var (S) — CLOSED: Replace hardcoded ~/TheIgors paths in skills with CC_WORKFLOW_TOOLS env var  `done` — CC_WORKFLOW_TOOLS=/home/akien/TheIgors/lab/claudecode added to ~/.bashrc; all 29 skill files updated in both ~/.claude/skills/ and UnseenUniversity/skills/ (commit 7bbcc26)
- T-reference-chat-agent (M) — CLOSED: Reference chat agent skeleton in UnseenUniversity  `done` — Reference chat agent at UnseenUniversity/examples/chat_agent/agent.py — direct anthropic SDK, optional db.py memory, clean shutdown (commit ff13324)
- T-skills-sync-skill (M) — CLOSED: Build skills-sync skill — ~/.claude/skills ↔ repo canonical copy  `done` — skills-sync/SKILL.md built — wraps agentctl skills deploy/status, batch consent, bidirectional (repo→local + local→repo), discovers repo path via DEFAULT_MASTER_ROOT import (commit fea2166 on agent_da
- T-agentctl-env-and-skills (S) — DESIGNED: agentctl init — set CC_WORKFLOW_TOOLS and run skills-sync on first install  `done` — agentctl init now detects CC_WORKFLOW_TOOLS, writes to shell profile (idempotent), runs skills deploy on init; graceful skip when lab/claudecode not in UnseenUniversity yet (commit 47f8f65)

_Generated by cc_queue.py _decision_rollup. File-stub until T-decisions-into-palace-subtree moves rollups into the memory palace._
